hero.title: Explore aesthetic, medical and wellness treatments
hero.description: Browse each major category, understand what it includes, and explore the subcategories used to match patients with the right doctors.

categoriesPage.chooseProceduresDescription: Choose up to 3 procedures and we’ll find the best doctors for you.

aesthetic_medicine_face.title: Aesthetic medicine face
aesthetic_medicine_face.description: Minimally invasive facial treatments focused on volume, skin quality, lifting, resurfacing, and rejuvenation.

aesthetic_medicine_body.title: Aesthetic medicine body
aesthetic_medicine_body.description: Body contouring, fat reduction, weight management, and wellness-led treatments without surgery.

aesthetic_dentistry.title: Aesthetic dentistry
aesthetic_dentistry.description: Cosmetic dental treatments designed to improve smile shape, brightness, balance, and restoration.

hair_medicine.title: Hair medicine
hair_medicine.description: Hair restoration, scalp treatments, and surgical or non-surgical solutions for hair health.

muscle_tone_and_ems.title: Muscle tone & EMS
muscle_tone_and_ems.description: Electrical muscle stimulation treatments for body sculpting, facial toning, and performance support.

iv_therapy.title: IV therapy
iv_therapy.description: Intravenous hydration, vitamins, recovery, immunity, energy, and beauty-focused wellness drips.

wellness_and_drainage.title: Wellness & drainage
wellness_and_drainage.description: Treatments supporting circulation, lymphatic drainage, relaxation, recovery, and general wellbeing.

surgical_face.title: Surgical face
surgical_face.description: Surgical facial procedures for lifting, contouring, reshaping, and structural facial refinement.

surgical_body.title: Surgical body
surgical_body.description: Surgical body contouring, breast surgery, intimate procedures, liposuction, and body reshaping.

longevity_medicine.title: Longevity medicine
longevity_medicine.description: Diagnostics, regenerative medicine, performance optimization, and medical longevity programs.

hyaluronic_acid_fillers.title: Hyaluronic acid fillers
hyaluronic_acid_fillers.description: Volume restoration and contour enhancement using hyaluronic acid-based injectables.

biostimulators_and_skin_quality_injectio.title: Biostimulators & skin quality injections
biostimulators_and_skin_quality_injectio.description: Injectable treatments designed to improve collagen production, elasticity, hydration, and skin quality.

botulinum_toxin.title: Botulinum toxin
botulinum_toxin.description: Neuromodulator treatments used to soften dynamic lines and refine facial expression balance.

thread_lifting.title: Thread lifting
thread_lifting.description: Minimally invasive thread-based lifting procedures for subtle facial tightening and repositioning.

radiofrequency_and_hifu.title: Radiofrequency & HIFU
radiofrequency_and_hifu.description: Energy-based tightening treatments using radiofrequency, ultrasound, or HIFU technology.

lasers_and_light_devices.title: Lasers & light devices
lasers_and_light_devices.description: Laser and light-based treatments for pigmentation, texture, rejuvenation, and skin correction.

peeling_needling_and_skin_resurfacing.title: Peeling, needling & skin resurfacing
peeling_needling_and_skin_resurfacing.description: Resurfacing treatments that improve texture, pores, glow, and superficial skin irregularities.

skin_diagnosis.title: Skin diagnosis
skin_diagnosis.description: Digital or clinical skin analysis used to guide personalized treatment planning.

fat_reduction_and_body_contouring.title: Fat reduction & body contouring
fat_reduction_and_body_contouring.description: Non-surgical body shaping treatments targeting localized fat, firmness, and contour.

weight_management_and_nutrition.title: Weight management & nutrition
weight_management_and_nutrition.description: Medical and nutritional support for weight loss, body composition, and metabolic goals.

veneers_and_restoration.title: Veneers & restoration
veneers_and_restoration.description: Smile-enhancing restorations including veneers, bonding, crowns, and cosmetic repairs.

whitening.title: Whitening
whitening.description: Dental whitening treatments designed to improve brightness and reduce visible staining.

gum_and_shape.title: Gum & shape
gum_and_shape.description: Gum contouring and tooth-shape refinements for improved smile balance.

non_surgical_hair_treatments.title: Non-surgical hair treatments
non_surgical_hair_treatments.description: Scalp and injectable treatments supporting hair density, growth, and scalp health.

surgical_hair_procedures.title: Surgical hair procedures
surgical_hair_procedures.description: Surgical solutions for hairline, forehead, and hair restoration concerns.

face.title: Face

body.title: Body
body.description: EMS-based body treatments supporting muscle tone, sculpting, and performance.

general_and_hydration.title: General & hydration
general_and_hydration.description: General IV drips focused on hydration, replenishment, and tailored wellness support.

vitamins_and_antioxidants.title: Vitamins & antioxidants
vitamins_and_antioxidants.description: Vitamin, mineral, and antioxidant infusions for beauty, immunity, and recovery.

energy_performance_and_recovery.title: Energy, performance & recovery
energy_performance_and_recovery.description: IV treatments designed for energy, stress, exercise recovery, and performance support.

wellness_and_beauty.title: Wellness & beauty
wellness_and_beauty.description: IV protocols targeting glow, immunity, detox, hair, weight, and anti-aging support.

drainage_and_circulation.title: Drainage & circulation
drainage_and_circulation.description: Treatments supporting lymphatic flow, circulation, swelling reduction, and vascular concerns.

recovery_and_relaxation.description: Wellness treatments designed for recovery, relaxation, and overall body balance.

eyes_and_brows.description: Surgical procedures focused on the eyelids, brows, and eye-area definition.

nose.title: Nose

lipofilling_and_fat_transfer.description: Fat transfer procedures used to restore facial volume and improve natural contour.

foot_surgery.description: Aesthetic and corrective procedures for forefoot structure and appearance.

biological_assessment_and_diagnostics.description: Testing and diagnostics used to assess biological age, metabolism, fitness, and longevity markers.

cellular_and_regenerative_therapies.description: Regenerative treatments targeting cellular repair, systemic health, and longevity support.
